ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 3pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 65. West wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
